channel.title: Business - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

1. The financialisation of AI is just beginning  The Economist

  3. Big Tech approaches ‘red flag’ moment: AI capex is so great hyperscalers could go cash flow negative, Evercore warns  Fortune
  4. AI Boom Creates Blind Spot in Big Tech Accounting - Tech News Briefing - WSJ Podcasts  The Wall Street Journal
  5. The Data Center AI Spending Boom Hides a Dirty Little Secret  The Motley Fool

item.title: FDA Announces Peanut Butter Recall in 40 States—Products May Contain Pieces of Plastic - Health: Trusted and Empathetic Health and Wellness Information
item.description:
1. FDA Announces Peanut Butter Recall in 40 States—Products May Contain Pieces of Plastic  Health: Trusted and Empathetic Health and Wellness Information
  2. Check your pantry: Peanut butter recalled in 40 states  USA Today
  3. FDA updates peanut butter recall in 40 states, including NJ, Pa.  6abc Philadelphia
  4. Peanut butter products recalled in 40 states over 'foreign material' contamination  LiveNOW from FOX
  5. Massive peanut butter recall issued across 40 states, including Oregon  OregonLive.com
item.source: Health: Trusted and Empathetic Health and Wellness Information

item.title: You need $2 million to retire and ‘almost no one is close,’ BlackRock CEO warns, a problem that Gen X will make ‘harder and nastier’ - Yahoo Finance
item.description:
1. You need $2 million to retire and ‘almost no one is close,’ BlackRock CEO warns, a problem that Gen X will make ‘harder and nastier’  Yahoo Finance
  2. 'No one is close': BlackRock’s Larry Fink warns Americans have saved egregiously less than they need for retirement  Fortune
  3. Is $2 Million Sufficient for Retirement? Experts Share Their Insights  Investopedia
  4. Trump wants private equity in 401(k)s. Voters approve.  USA Today
  5. BlackRock's Larry Fink Said Gen Z And Millennials Are 'Economically Anxious' For A Reason. They Blame Boomers For Focusing Only On Themselves  Yahoo Finance
